title: L0 Agent Capability Types Registry
description: Bootstrap registry for agent capability discovery (Layer 0). IANA-style: designated experts review + approve + deprecate. PR process from day 1.

governance.process: PR to this file. Tests required. Majority maintainer approval.

attestation.description: Agent can produce signed attestations about other agents or events

delivery.description: Agent can deliver work products (code, reports, data) against a contract

scoring.description: Agent can evaluate and score other agents' work or trustworthiness

settlement.description: Agent can handle financial settlement (escrow, payment, staking)

discovery.description: Agent can resolve other agents' capabilities and trust endpoints

constraints.deprecation: types can be deprecated but never removed (append-only)
